title: MIGRATION.md regex missing g flag and tool dialect
description: MIGRATION.md line 19: the transformation rule s|secretx://([^/?]+)/|secretx:\1:| has no g flag (only replaces first match per line) and no tool specification. BSD sed (macOS) uses a different backreference syntax. A user copying this into their shell gets either silent partial replacement or a syntax error. Fix: write 'sed -E s|secretx://([^/?]+)/|secretx:\1:|g' and note Linux/macOS sed differences.
